creator: marek@mky.waw.pl
text: I can confirm, that the bug still exists on 11.2-RELEASE and only if the wireless network is 802.11n (2.4GHz and 5GHz). If the network type is 802.11abg, the statistics shows correctly. I am using Levono Thinkpad X201 with "Intel Centrino Ultimate-N 6300" wireless adapter.
